title.en: A True Monarch puppet turned into a blood mist ...

content.en:
"Die!"

A True Monarch puppet turned into a blood mist under the attack of the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations.

At this moment, the Dao Ancestor incarnations are very angry, they are Dao Ancestors, high up, and now these True Monarchs who are as weak as ants dare to attack them, this is a mortal sin.

As a result, the incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors no longer kept their hands.

Although they came as incarnations, they still carried some strange things on their bodies, so their combat power was very strong, and their realm was too high, and one part of their strength could exert several points of strength.

Therefore, these true monarch puppets are like ants in their hands, and they can crush them if they touch them.

Of course, these puppets are too strong to recover from being able to kill them even if they are beaten into a blood mist.

The real way to kill them is to annihilate their souls or grind them to death again and again.

The strength of the soul consciousness of the Dao Ancestor incarnations is very high, but the soul consciousness they carry is too small, so they naturally will not use their soul attacks, otherwise if the soul consumption is too high, the strength of the incarnation will not be able to be brought into play.

Therefore, they can only choose to grind these True Monarch puppets to death again and again, which leads to a stalemate in the battle and cannot end quickly.

Basically, a True Monarch puppet can maintain three recovery opportunities under the Dao Ancestor incarnation, and after three times, the energy is almost exhausted and cannot be recovered.

Therefore, with the passage of time, a puppet of the True Monarch fell and died.

......

"Sure enough, I still can't stop these four Dao Ancestor incarnations, if it's just one Dao Ancestor incarnation, pay a huge price, and still have a chance to wipe it out!"

Jiong sighed.

In short, there is still too little time left for him, if it is enough, he is enough to build the Red Dragon Dojo into a not weak force, and there is no need to fear the Dao Ancestor incarnation.

But now, four Dao Ancestor incarnations have descended, and the Red Dragon Dojo can't stop it at all.

"The master is still asleep, you can't disturb the master, otherwise it will affect the master's strength recovery!"

Jiong is embarrassed.

With the current situation of the dojo, the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors has invaded the interior of the dojo, and the dojo has little hope of being able to stop it at all, unless he can completely control the prohibition and formation of the dojo.

But it can't be!

Even the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor could not rest assured that a dojo would be completely managed by the spirit of the dojo.

After a while, the number of True Monarch puppets is not much left, although the True Monarch puppets have captured some True Monarchs and sent them to the Red Dragon Pool for transformation, but because the transformation time is too short, they can only be barely controlled, and they cannot completely transform the physical body, and their strength has not improved much, and they can't play much use at all, so they can only be used as cannon fodder.

Gradually, there were more and more fallen True Monarchs, and even the half-step True Ancestor puppets also fell, leaving only Luohai True Monarch who was still holding on, but his body was also worn out several times, and he couldn't hold on for long.

on the battlefield.

The incarnation of Mengyue Dao Ancestor had just killed a group of True Monarch puppets, and when he was about to strike again, a terrifying force restrained him, and then a terrifying annihilation occurred.

Rumble!!!!

An area of the dojo collapsed directly, and the Mengyue Dao Ancestor incarnation forcibly flew out of the annihilation area, looking very miserable all over, and even one of his arms was missing.

But in an instant, the Mengyue Dao Ancestor incarnation recovered this arm.

"Sure enough, he didn't die!"

Jiong said regretfully.

He had just forcibly mobilized the power of the dojo to concentrate on one point and launched an attack on the Mengyue Dao Ancestor, because the physical defense of the incarnation of the Mengyue Dao Ancestor was the weakest, and it was most likely to kill him.

Then, the blow just now was enough to kill some True Ancestors in the middle and even late stages of the Great Dao, but it still didn't kill the Mengyue Dao Ancestor incarnation.

And the other side.

Mengyue Dao Ancestor had palpitations in his heart, just now, her incarnation was almost killed.

As a Dao Ancestor, her realm is so high, and she has mastered a variety of origin supernatural powers, and her control of power is beyond the imagination of others, the blow just now would have been enough to kill her, but she avoided the concentration point of power annihilation, instantly found out the weak point, and forcibly broke the space and escaped.

Otherwise, her avatar would not be saved.

If it was usual, an avatar fell, she wouldn't care in the slightest.

But in a period like this, once the incarnation falls, if you want to pay a huge price to condense an incarnation and send it to the Quasi-Dao Realm, the price paid is too great, enough to make her herself reincarnate.

Therefore, if the incarnation falls, it will not be able to interfere with the battlefield ruins for a long time, and the loss will be too great.

The battlefield relics now have countless opportunities, even for a Dao Ancestor like her, there are many opportunities.

She didn't want to give up this opportunity, at least to reap some benefits.

Next, Jiong attacked several Dao Ancestor avatars again, and although he injured them, he did not kill even one of the Dao Ancestor avatars.

There is no way, condense the power of the dojo to attack, the speed is not very fast, and it is easy to be dodged.

In addition, as Jiong launched more attacks, the prohibition of the dojo began to become unstable, and the prohibition in some places even began to crumble.

It didn't take long for the entire dojo to be filled with spatial cracks, as if the dojo was about to collapse.

The Red Dragon Dojo was originally in the cracks of the battlefield ruins, and with the serious consumption of the Red Dragon Dojo's strength, coupled with the collapse of the prohibition, it was naturally difficult to maintain.

At this moment, Ye Tian exploded with all his strength, and with one blow that shook the air, he directly shattered a True Ancestor-level puppet, and immediately knocked another True Ancestor-level puppet away, and then flew towards the Heavenly Soul Tree.

"The prohibition is gone, and the prohibition on the Heavenly Soul Tree is estimated to be unstable, so I may be able to get more Heavenly Soul Fruit!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The Heavenly Soul Fruit is indeed a good thing, but it's a pity that the growth rate is too slow, and the Heavenly Soul Tree of the Red Dragon Dojo has grown in the battlefield ruins for a long time, which is why so many Heavenly Soul Fruits have grown.

A person can only take one Heavenly Soul Fruit in his lifetime, which is indeed true, but if the Heavenly Soul Fruit is refined into a Heavenly Soul Pill, it can be taken nine times, which is also what Ye Tian learned from the Black Wind Mountain Classic Book Space.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai wanted to get more Heavenly Soul Fruit.

In addition, he can also give the Heavenly Soul Fruit to his relatives, or even leave it to the human race, or take it out to trade, which is enough to exchange for countless resources.

Swish!

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and he soon came to the Heavenly Soul Tree.

Jiong also wanted to intercept Ye Tian, but his focus now was on dealing with the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors, where was there still a mind to care about Ye Tian!

In this way, Ye Tian came to the Heavenly Soul Tree, and now there is no one True Monarch here, and there are not many True Monarchs alive in the entire dojo now, even if there are a few left, they are trying their best to resist the True Monarch puppet or try to leave the dojo.

"Sure enough, the ban here is about to dissipate!"

Ye Tian looked at the huge Heavenly Soul Tree and muttered.

Without further ado, collect the Heavenly Soul Fruit and begin!
